steps.title: Identify the key mechanism
steps.content: The phrase “placing audiences at a distance” is the decisive clue. This directly opposes emotional immersion — being at a distance means audiences step back from immediate empathetic reactions and achieve objective detachment.

steps.title: Match distance to critical thinking
steps.content: Emotional distance enables dispassionate, critical engagement with the social and political questions the play interrogates — exactly what Brecht's philosophy requires. A narrows focus to individual characters; B introduces unrelated phenomena; C proposes a historical comparison the text doesn't support. That matches choice D — D is correct.
